$comment: Product registry — single source of truth for project scope, repo resolution, and lane defaults. Live Task Manager remains authoritative for sprint existence and sprint-targeted mutations.

products.name: AutoTrade
products.description: Self-improving agentic paper-trading desk + trader_intel web app
products.notes: Trading logic changes flow as rule_proposals (human-gated); web/app code via normal PR lane.

products.name: ResiLife (EWAG iOS)
products.description: Multifamily wellness amenity iOS app — EWAG's product

repos.note: clone PENDING — mac lacks non-interactive GitHub auth (deploy key needed)

verify: ssh mac-dev: xcodebuild -scheme ResiLife -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15' build
products.notes: Runner containers (lidi-task-manager-ewag-agent-*) handle branch/PR scaffolding; codegen goes through the gateway codex lane.
products.note_lane: EWAG worker-container lane decommissioned 2026-07-14; standard coding lane only
products.paused_note: Paused 2026-07-14 (Aaron): Dwight works ONLY the ATS v6 Trading Intel sprint for now

products.name: MONTRA

repos.note: authoritative host checkout for gateway and Claude/Codex sessions
mac node checkout for iOS build/test work

verify: ssh mac-dev: cd ~/repos/MONTRA && xcodebuild -scheme MONTRA -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' build
web console: cd /home/aaron/repos/lidi-solutions && npm run build

$comment2: gateway_path = checkout visible inside the openclaw-gateway container (~/.openclaw/mirrors); path = host checkout. dwight-launch prefers gateway_path when running in-container.
